scripts.dev:webapp:3004: bash ./scripts/dev-free-ports.sh 3004 && pnpm --dir app-webapp exec next dev --turbopack --port 3004
scripts.dev:admin:local-auth: bash ./scripts/dev-free-ports.sh 3001 && AUTH_OIDC_CLIENT_ID=praedixa-webapp AUTH_APP_ORIGIN=http://localhost:3001 pnpm --dir app-admin exec next dev --turbopack --port 3001
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @praedixa/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @praedixa/telemetry build && pnpm --filter @praedixa/api-ts build && pnpm --filter @praedixa/connectors build && pnpm --filter @praedixa/ui build && pnpm --filter @praedixa/landing build && pnpm --filter @praedixa/webapp build && pnpm --filter @praedixa/admin build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @praedixa/shared-types lint && pnpm --filter @praedixa/telemetry lint && pnpm --filter @praedixa/api-ts lint && pnpm --filter @praedixa/connectors lint && pnpm --filter @praedixa/ui lint && pnpm --filter @praedixa/landing lint && pnpm --filter @praedixa/webapp lint && pnpm --filter @praedixa/admin lint
scripts.test:e2e:landing: pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 PW_SERVER_TARGETS=landing playwright test --project=landing --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:webapp: pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 PW_SERVER_TARGETS=webapp playwright test --project=webapp
scripts.test:e2e:webapp:timeline: pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 PW_SERVER_TARGETS=webapp playwright test testing/e2e/webapp/timeline-regression.spec.ts --project=webapp --workers=1 --reporter=list
scripts.test:e2e:webapp:visual: pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 PW_SERVER_TARGETS=webapp playwright test testing/e2e/webapp/visual-qa-premium.spec.ts --project=webapp --workers=1 --reporter=list
scripts.test:e2e:admin: pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 PW_SERVER_TARGETS=admin playwright test --project=admin
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 PW_SERVER_TARGETS=webapp,admin playwright test testing/e2e/webapp/smoke.spec.ts testing/e2e/admin/smoke.spec.ts --project=webapp --project=admin --workers=1 --reporter=list
scripts.test:e2e:coverage: pnpm e2e:ports:free && PW_REUSE_SERVER=0 COVERAGE=1 playwright test
scripts.ci:strict: pnpm lint && pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:ci && pnpm test:e2e:ci
scripts.mvp:gate: pnpm pre-commit && pnpm test:e2e:landing && pnpm test:e2e:webapp && pnpm test:e2e:admin
scripts.deploy: echo 'GitHub/Cloudflare deploy disabled. Use scw:deploy:* scripts.'
scripts.deploy:landing: echo 'GitHub/Cloudflare deploy disabled. Use local Scaleway CLI.'
scripts.deploy:webapp: echo 'GitHub/Cloudflare deploy disabled. Use local Scaleway CLI.'
scripts.scw:deploy:landing:staging: echo 'Legacy landing deploy disabled. Use pnpm release:build / release:manifest:create / release:deploy.' && exit 1
scripts.scw:deploy:landing:prod: echo 'Legacy landing deploy disabled. Use pnpm release:build / release:manifest:create / release:deploy.' && exit 1
scripts.architecture:frontend: pnpm --package dependency-cruiser@16.10.4 --package typescript@5.9.3 dlx depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --output-type err app-landing app-webapp app-admin packages
scripts.architecture:api: pnpm --package dependency-cruiser@16.10.4 --package typescript@5.9.3 dlx depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.api.cjs --output-type err app-api-ts app-connectors packages
scripts.architecture:repo: pnpm architecture:dependency-cruiser && pnpm architecture:knip && pnpm architecture:ts-guardrails
scripts.gate:architecture:frontend: pnpm architecture:frontend && pnpm architecture:knip && pnpm architecture:ts-guardrails
